source.section: Part 13 - Radio Tutorial > ARC-210 Radio Tutorial

steps.action: Left click on the COMM1 knob to pull it and select COMM1 Radio
Scroll mousewheel on COMM1 Radio Channel Selector to M (Manual) Mode
Press the OSB next to AM or FM to select the desired frequency band (if we choose FM, the “:FM” symbol will appear when selected)
Press CLR on the UFC to clear current frequency
Type “127500” on the UFC to set carrier radio frequency 127.5 MHz
Press ENT on the UFC to enter this frequency.
Press the COMM switch – COMM1 on your throttle to transmit.
